Billy Sunday Birt's recipe for corn whiskey , peach brandy and apple brandy came to him from his maternal grandfather Henry Pink Hegwood . Pink's brother John Hegwood was hung in 1912 for shooting a man that had been involved in telling the revenuers where John , Pink and their younger brother , Homer Hegwood's whiskey still was located . When asked last words , for r any last John simply said , " LET UR RIP ! " PEACH BRANDY For over two decades from the mid 50's and through the mid 70's , Billy made his peach and apple brandies from these time - honored recipes . Billy Sunday Birt became the undisputed leader of Georgia's " Dixie Mafia " in the mid 60's . For the 10 years they supplied Georgia and the Carolinas with the best whiskey available at that time . The brandies were made special and not for profit . They were seasonal and made only for special gifts for friends . Politicians , public officials and celebrations . We think it's about time for this delicious drink to be enjoyed by all . Enjoy over ice . BARGYLUS GRAND VIN DE SYRIE 2011 Cited by Pliny the Elder , Mount - Bargylus , known today as Jebel Al - Ansariyet , spreads from the Orontes Valley near the ancient city of Antioch to the Eleutherus Valley in the south of ancient Emesa . Located in the hinterland of the modern Syrian city of Latakia and the Canaanite metropolis of Ugarit , the slopes of Mount - Bargylus were richly covered with vines during the Greco - Roman era . The Johnny R. Saadé family created Domaine de Bargylus for the revival of an exceptional vineyard on this ancestral land . DaVero Fattoria For us , it's always all about the farm - Fattoria in Italian . Ultimately , it's our sole constraint , which from time to time we celebrate by coloring outside the lines . ७ ९ SINGLE BARRE SNAKE CREEK BOURBON WHISKEY Along the winding bend of Snake Creek , where the water carves its own path and the air carries whispers of old Appalachian lore , our story takes shape . This single barrel bourbon is born in the quiet bends of Kentucky , where mist settles low and the land remembers every drop of rain . In this stretch of rolling hills and limestone- rich earth , cool nights and warm days guide the barrels through slow , patient seasons deepening the spirit & drawing out its unmistakable flavor . Like Snake Creek itself , no two barrels follow the same journey . When this particular barrel finally reached its perfect moment , it was brought to Virginia - where mountain air and careful hands bottled it without haste or compromise . No blending , no shortcuts . Just the expression of the rich oak barrel where it was aged and shaped by time & patience . The oak maturation imparts aromas of vanilla cream drifting forward , followed by notes of brown sugar and cinnamon spice . The finish reveals subtle impressions of cherry and maple syrup reflecting the character it developed during its time in the valley .

Produced in small batches and bottled by hand unfined and unfiltered , these wines allow our winemaker to explore the Finger Lakes ' bounty and her own creativity . Pétillant Naturel wines are sparkling wines made using the méthode ancestrale , an ancient technique of bottling before the primary fermentation is complete , trapping the carbonation for a low intervention wine that is fresh , fruity , and fizzy . It can sometimes be unpredictable and often contains sediment from the fermentation at the bottom . Our Ice Wine is produced from the naturally frozen Chambourcin grapes , grown on our farm in the Grand River Valley , Ohio's premier growing region . To capture true " Ice Wine , " the grapes at Debonné hang on the vine after normal harvest until the outside temperature reaches 15 to 17 degrees Fahrenheit in our vineyards . The frozen grapes are transported to the winery and pressed immediately in a high pressure basket press to capture the few drops of sweet concentrated juice , then fermented slowly to help preserve the intense flavor and aromas experienced in ice wine . Vera Roze prodhohet , nga rrushi kuq debina e zeze , në fshatin Leçe , 750 m mbi nivelin e detit . Vera ka një ngjyrë rozë qershizë , brilante , te freskët , ku dallohen lulet dhe frutat me lëkurë të verdhë dhe të kuqe . Vera shprehet elegante , fine , harmonike , e shijshme , e zgjatur dhe komplekse . Temperatura ideale e servirjes është 12-13 ° C . Këshillohet të shoqërohet me pasta , miks djathërash , fruta deti , mish të bardhë dhe mishin e shpendëve të egra . Rose wine produced from red grapes " Black Debina " of Leskovik region cultivated in Leçe village in the altitude of 750 meters above sea level . The wine expresses a cherry pink color , brilliant , fresh , warm , with a hint of yellow and red skinned fruits and flowers . The wine is elegant , fine harmonious , tasty , long - lasting and complex . The ideal serving temperature is 12-13 ° C . It is best served with mixed cheeses , pasta , seafood , white meat and wild poultry .
